body:
# TrueShot
is a client-side aiming assistant that visualizes projectile trajectories and predicts whether your shot is likely to hit a target.
The mod does not aim for you or modify accuracy — it only displays helpful visual information.

TrueShot is useful for PvP, PvE, bow duels, crystal PvP, and for players who want to understand Minecraft’s projectile physics more clearly.

## Features
• Predicts hits with bow, crossbow, and trident
• Works even when the crossbow is fully charged
• Displays a clean and accurate trajectory line
• Supports players, mobs, and end crystals
• Three crosshair states:
– White — miss
– Orange — near hit (grazes extended hitbox)
– Red — direct hit prediction
• Fully client-side
• Lightweight and compatible with any server
• Perfectly centered custom crosshair

**How it Works**

TrueShot simulates the flight of arrows, bolts, and tridents on the client side.
It predicts their motion over time and checks whether the path intersects with entity hitboxes.
This allows the crosshair to show accurate feedback about potential hits without altering gameplay mechanics.

**Usage**

Just aim with one of the following:
• Bow (while pulling)
• Crossbow (while pulling or fully charged)
• Trident (while charging a throw)

The mod automatically shows the trajectory and changes the crosshair color based on hit prediction.

### Installation

1. Download the mod file

2. Place it into your mods folder

3. Launch Minecraft with Fabric

4. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
